_meta.title: Frozen Salmon Sourcing FAQ: 6 Key Fields Every Importer Should Clarify Before Requesting a Quote

claims.claim: Salmon product category listed as available sourcing range
Species differences (Atlantic vs. Pacific), product forms, packing options explained as general industry knowledge
claims.evidence: General seafood industry knowledge. Atlantic salmon (Salmo salar) vs Pacific species (Chinook, Coho, Sockeye, Pink, Chum) — well-documented trade distinction. Product forms (WR, H&G, fillet, portion, trim, belly, skin) and packing (IQF, block, vacuum) are standard B2B frozen seafood terminology. No company-specific claims made — pure buyer education content.

panguan_review.c1_resolution: needs_review → verified_by_panguan. General industry knowledge about salmon species differences, product forms, and packing options. Pure buyer education content — no company-specific claims. C1 per governance: '常规服务能力 — 规格沟通' category. Verified without web search (common trade knowledge).

claims.claim: Dingdingmiao supports salmon specification matching and inquiry coordination
